No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication, social protection, or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to food security, nutrition, sustainable agriculture, or food systems.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to health outcomes, disease prevention, substance abuse, or healthcare access.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). The cultural and historical overview of the Czech Republic promotes appreciation of cultural diversity and global citizenship (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to gender discrimination, violence, equal opportunities, or reproductive rights.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to water access, sanitation, water quality, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to economic growth, employment, labor rights, or sustainable tourism.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to infrastructure development, industrialization, innovation, or technology.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to income inequality, social inclusion, or migration policies.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to urban development, housing, transport, or cultural heritage protection.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to sustainable consumption, resource efficiency, waste reduction, or sustainable tourism.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change, resilience, or mitigation efforts.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to violence reduction, justice, rule of law, or institutional transparency.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Learning a foreign language, while beneficial for communication, is too indirect to meet the specific institutional, financial, and technological partnership targets of SDG 17.
